name: Calendar Management
author: Archie (built-in)
description: Full Google Calendar management — create, read, update, and delete events via natural language.
long_description: Give your agent the ability to fully manage a Google Calendar. It can check availability, create events, reschedule meetings, set reminders, find free slots, and summarize upcoming schedules. All changes require confirmation before executing. Requires a connected Google account with calendar access.

required_variables.label: Calendar ID
required_variables.help: Usually 'primary' for your main calendar. For a shared calendar, use its email address.

required_variables.label: Work day starts at
required_variables.help: 24-hour format (e.g. 09:00). The agent won't schedule events before this time unless you explicitly ask.

required_variables.label: Work day ends at
required_variables.help: 24-hour format (e.g. 17:00). The agent won't schedule events after this time unless you explicitly ask.

required_variables.label: Default event duration (minutes)
required_variables.help: When no duration is specified, events will be created with this length.

required_variables.label: Scheduling preferences
required_variables.placeholder: Prefer mornings for deep work, keep Fridays light
required_variables.help: Any personal preferences for how events should be scheduled.

setup_steps: Connect your Google account by clicking 'Connect Google' in the agent settings.
Set your working hours so the agent respects your schedule boundaries.
Optionally add scheduling preferences (e.g. 'prefer mornings for focus time').
